C[dem: Not going exactly how I imagined, in case you're wondering... :)
dem: Have you been playing long?

C[amaresu: Sorry, didn't mean to be rude.  I've been playing off and on for about 7 years.  More off then on really.  Took a year and half break where I didn't play at all.  It was kind of painful to see just how badly my game had suffered.
dem: No worries. Now I don't feel quite so bad. That was a major blunder. I've been playing for about a month.
dem: In any case, I can imagine how taking even a few weeks away would have an effect on your game.
C[amaresu: Yeah, although discovering this site and DragonGo has been helpful.  It's way easier to get a game as a low level kyu here than on KGS.
dem: Wow, you really have me on the run now.
C[amaresu: Eh, it's early in the game.
dem: Maybe... Used up my one big blunder though, that's for sure.
